steps.title: Identify the coordination structure
steps.content: The sentence pairs two past actions with “and”: Price “premiered her First Symphony” and “[blank] supportive relationships.” Both actions are under the same subject at the same grammatical level, so both verbs must be in the same form.

steps.title: Match the verb form
steps.content: ”Developed” (past tense) matches “premiered” and maintains the parallel structure required by “and.” The other three options—developing, to develop, and having developed—use different verb forms that break the required parallelism. That matches choice B — B is correct.
